user.title: Dishwasher Duty
user.description: Track who unloads the dishwasher. Pick the source sensor (e.g. the Home Connect "Operation state" sensor) and the people who may claim a cycle.

error.no_finished_value: Enter the state value that means "finished".

init.title: Dishwasher Duty settings
init.description: Adjust the source sensor, the finished/running state values, the eligible persons and the co-claim behaviour.

error.no_finished_value: Enter the state value that means "finished".

claim.name: Claim
claim.description: Claim the currently open cycle for one person.

claim_multiple.name: Claim (multiple)
claim_multiple.description: Claim the open cycle for several people at once (credit shared equally).

cancel_claim.name: Cancel claim
cancel_claim.description: Withdraw a person's claim while the claim window is still open.

get_statistics.name: Get statistics
get_statistics.description: Return structured unload statistics for a time range.

reset_statistics.name: Reset statistics
reset_statistics.description: Reset stored cycle history (all, or for one person).
